Independent verifier, live evidence gathered personally (not from the builder's self-report). Spec content review: tests/e2e/dashboard-students.spec.ts (255 lines, 2 tests) matches the task-21 objective exactly -- fresh throwaway parent (never seeded parent@schooltest.local), fills given/family name + year 9 + unique email e2e+<Date.now()>@schooltest.local via the real AddStudentDialog, row appears with zero manual reload (query invalidation), then a real page.reload({waitUntil:'load'}) hard reload, row still visible, then a direct page.request.get('/api/my/students') call using the real JWT read from localStorage['app.auth.token'] on the reloaded page -- bypassing TanStack Query/React entirely. Verified DB-truth myself (not just API/UI truth): psql against the live Postgres (127.0.0.1:5540/schooltest) shows the created rows (ids 872 'Nora Reload' year 9 with email, 873 'First Student' year 9) genuinely persisted, and students_parent_lnk join-table rows tie each to its OWN distinct throwaway parent (user_id 230/232), proving real per-caller ownership, not incidental single-row luck.
